zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Dacre於大約1410年出生在英國波藍德布藍普頓時，他的父親Sir Thomas Dacre24歲，母親Lady Philippa Baroness of Dacre and Gillesland DeNeville 19th GGA24歲。他和Elizabeth Bowett至少有3個女兒。他去世於1448年1月15日在英國諾圖波藍德吉爾曼德享年39歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波藍德萊納爾可斯特。

zh-hans.Gisland, Northumberland, England: 英国英格兰諾圖波藍德
zh-hans.Gilsland, Northumberland, England: 英国諾圖波藍德吉爾曼德
zh-hans.Lanercost, Cumberland, England: 英国英格兰波藍德萊納爾可斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Dacre于大约1410年出生在英国波藍德布藍普頓时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Dacre24岁，母亲Lady Philippa Baroness of Dacre and Gillesland DeNeville 19th GGA24岁。他和Elizabeth Bowett至少有3个女儿。他去世于1448年1月15日在英国諾圖波藍德吉爾曼德享年39岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波藍德萊納爾可斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Dacre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from either of two places called Dacre, one in Cumbria, the other in Yorkshire.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Dacre was born about 1410, in Brampton, Cumberland, England, his father, Sir Thomas Dacre, was 24 and his mother, Lady Philippa Baroness of Dacre and Gillesland DeNeville 19th GGA, was 24. He had at least 3 daughters with Elizabeth Bowett. He died on 15 January 1448, in Gilsland, Northumberland, England, at the age of 39, and was buried in Lanercost, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Dacre est né environ 1410, à Brampton, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Dacre, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Philippa Baroness of Dacre and Gillesland DeNeville 19th GGA, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 filles avec Elizabeth Bowett. Il est décédé le 15 janvier 1448, à Gilsland, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Lanercost, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Dacre um 1410 in Brampton, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Dacre 24 und seine Mutter Lady Philippa Baroness of Dacre and Gillesland DeNeville 19th GGA 24. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Bowett mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Januar 1448 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Gilsland, Northumberland, England und wurde in Lanercost, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Dacre è nato il circa 1410 nel Brampton, Cumberland, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Dacre, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Lady Philippa Baroness of Dacre and Gillesland DeNeville 19th GGA, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figlie con Elizabeth Bowett. Morì il 15 gennaio 1448, nel Gilsland, Northumberland, England, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a Lanercost, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Gilsland, Northumberland, England: イギリスノースウンバーランドギルスランド
ja.Brampton, Cumberland, England: イギリスクウンバーランドブランプトン
ja.Lanercost, Cumberland, England: イギリスイギリスクウンバーランドランエルコスト
ja.Cumberland, England: イギリスイギリスクウンバーランド
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Dacreが約1410年にイギリスクウンバーランドブランプトンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Dacreは24歳，母Lady Philippa Baroness of Dacre and Gillesland DeNeville 19th GGAは24歳であった。彼はElizabeth Bowettとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1448年1月15日にイギリスノースウンバーランドギルスランドで39歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスクウンバーランドランエルコストにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Dacre(이)가 대략 1410년 영국 c벌랜드 브램프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Dacre(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Philippa Baroness of Dacre and Gillesland DeNeville 19th GGA(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Bowett(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1448년 1월 15일 영국 노르스벌랜드 길슬랜드에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 랜르코스트에 묻혔다.

mn.Gisland, Northumberland, England: Norðhymbra land, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Lanercost, Cumberland, England: Lanercost, Cumbraland, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Dacre nasceu aproximadamente 1410, em Brampton, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Dacre, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lady Philippa Baroness of Dacre and Gillesland DeNeville 19th GGA, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhas com Elizabeth Bowett. Ele faleceu em 15 de janeiro de 1448, em Gilsland, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Lanercost, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Dacre родился около 1410 г. в местности брамптон, кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Dacre было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Philippa Baroness of Dacre and Gillesland DeNeville 19th GGA, 24. У него было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Elizabeth Bowett. Он умер 15 января 1448 г. в местности джилсланд, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности ланиркост, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.Aft 1445: ina ua ma'ea e tusa o le 1445

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Dacre nació aproximadamente 1410, en Brampton, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Dacre, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Lady Philippa Baroness of Dacre and Gillesland DeNeville 19th GGA, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijas con Elizabeth Bowett. Murió el 15 de enero de 1448, en Gilsland, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en Lanercost, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
